_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=distortion-tolerant recall witness — a global phase screen (phi=5) on the probe is undone by phase-locked recall (the [518] distortion-correction property). -->
primary_source: (Owechko, 1987) IEEE JQE 25(3):619-634 (phase-conjugate resonator self-adjusting to the medium). Probe is corrupted pattern 0 through a global phase screen phi=5; phase-locked recall recovers pattern 0 shifted by phi.
